name: Shoot Straight Fort Lauderdale
description_short: Shoot Straight Fort Lauderdale is a credit repair provider based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. Rated 4.3/5 with 1,079 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Shoot Straight Fort Lauderdale is a credit repair provider serving clients in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. With 1,079 Google reviews and a 4.3/5.0 rating, Shoot Straight Fort Lauderdale has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a shooting range, ammunition supplier, gun shop, Shoot Straight Fort Lauderdale provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Fort Lauderdale, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Shoot Straight Fort Lauderdale operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Fort Lauderdale, Florida area who are considering Shoot Straight Fort Lauderdale should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
